zh.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie於1400年出生在英國諾福爾可堂納姆 馬可特。她於1427年與Roger De Dethick在英國英格蘭諾福爾可喬加結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie于1400年出生在英国諾福爾可堂納姆 馬可特。她于1427年与Roger De Dethick在英国英格兰諾福爾可喬加结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie was born in 1400, in Downham Market, Norfolk, England. She married Roger De Dethick in 1427, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie est née en 1400, à Downham Market, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Roger De Dethick en 1427, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie wurde 1400 in Downham Market, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat 1427 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Roger De Dethick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie è nata il nel 1400 nel Downham Market, Norfolk, England. Lei sposato Roger De Dethick nel 1427, nel Wormegay, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbieは1400年にイギリスノーフォルクダウンハム マーケトで生まれた。1427年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイでRoger De Dethickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie(은)는 1400년 영국 노르폴크 다운함 마크트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 워메가이에서 Roger De Dethick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie nasceu em 1400, em Downham Market, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Roger De Dethick em 1427, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie родилась в 1400 г. в местности доунам маркет, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger De Dethick в 1427 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Isabelle Auderbie nació en 1400, en Downham Market, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Roger De Dethick en 1427, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija.
